title: 语义搜索预检 + 回滚出声
description: Semantic: detect embed_enabled BEFORE prompting; if already on, skip the confirm and just report status (kills the ask->yes->'unchanged' anticlimax). Rollback: pipeline.rollback emits user-visible feedback (回滚项 + 项目最终状态) without leaking internal stack/paths.
action: In packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/guidance.stage.ts promptSemanticSearch (the unconditional confirm at lines 101-105, alreadyEnabled discovered at 111-116): probe current embed_enabled state BEFORE the confirm; if already enabled, do NOT call confirm — print a single status line t('cli.install.semantic.alreadyEnabled', {model}) = '已启用 embed_model=…'; only when NOT enabled run the existing confirm (default stays false). Do NOT change the confirm logic when disabled (red-line C-07). In packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/pipeline.ts rollback (lines 233-254, currently all catch{} swallowing): after executing rollback actions, emit user-visible feedback via renderer/console: count of rolled-back items + final project state, via t('cli.install.rollback.feedback', {count}) = '已回滚 N 项改动,项目保持原状' — MUST NOT print internal stack traces or filesystem paths (R15). Track rolled-back count from context.rollbackStack length (and stage rollback successes). All new copy via t() en+zh-CN.

criteria: grep -nE 'alreadyEnabled' packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/guidance.stage.ts shows the embed state (via enableSemanticSearch().alreadyEnabled — the idempotent check, NOT a literal embed_enabled which lives in semantic-search.ts) is checked BEFORE the confirm and the confirm is skipped when already enabled
grep -nE 'semantic.alreadyEnabled|已启用 embed' packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/zh-CN.ts returns >=1 match (status-only message exists)
grep -nE 'rollback.feedback|已回滚' packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/zh-CN.ts returns >=1 match (rollback feedback string exists)

grep -nA3 'catch' packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/pipeline.ts rollback() shows feedback is emitted after rollback (no longer a fully silent swallow) AND the feedback string contains no path/stack interpolation
[runtime] a test asserts that when embed_enabled is already true, promptSemanticSearch does NOT invoke confirm and emits the status line
[runtime] a test asserts rollback() emits a user-visible feedback line with the rolled-back item count and that the emitted string contains no filesystem path or stack-trace substring
convergence.verification: cd packages/cli && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm test -- guidance.stage && pnpm test -- pipeline
convergence.definition_of_done: 已启用语义搜索时不再弹 confirm 只报状态;失败回滚有用户可见反馈(回滚项数+项目最终状态)且不泄堆栈/路径。

files.change: Probe embed_enabled first; skip confirm + report status when already on
Emit user-visible feedback (count + final state) without leaking stack/paths

implementation: In guidance.stage.ts, read embed_enabled state before the confirm; branch: enabled -> status line only; disabled -> existing confirm unchanged
Add en+zh-CN keys for the alreadyEnabled status line
In pipeline.ts rollback(), count rolled-back items and emit t() feedback after the loop; ensure no path/stack interpolation
Add en+zh-CN keys for the rollback feedback line
Write tests: already-enabled skips confirm; rollback emits count-only feedback with no path/stack; run tsc + guidance + pipeline suites

reference.pattern: Reuse the unified renderer feedback path from TASK-001 for rollback messaging; keep clack confirm logic untouched when disabled (C-07)

rationale.chosen_approach: Semantic precheck removes the ask->yes->'unchanged' anticlimax; audible rollback turns a silent swallow into reassurance — both without touching clack confirm logic for the disabled case (C-07).
rationale.tradeoffs: Rollback feedback is deliberately coarse (count + 'project unchanged') to avoid alarming the user with internals (R15).

risks.risk: R15: rollback feedback over-exposes internals and alarms the user
risks.mitigation: copy-level: only '已回滚 N 项改动,项目保持原状' — no paths/stack

risks.risk: probing embed state before confirm could drift into changing clack confirm logic (C-07 red-line)
risks.mitigation: only add an early status-only branch when enabled; leave the disabled-case confirm call byte-identical
